source_preservation_rule: Preserve every source note and frozen manifest byte-for-byte; write a proposal only.

proposals.observed_fact: Both notes share canonical_key alpha-launch-plan and contain complementary launch requirements.
proposals.proposed_change: Create a human-reviewed merge proposal that keeps roadmap and accessibility evidence sections separate before any note is edited.
proposals.source_preservation_rule: Do not delete or overwrite either source note; preserve both paths until a human approves.
proposals.reason: The merge signal is the frozen canonical key plus complementary content, not title similarity.

proposals.observed_fact: The note says invoices are due in 30 days while current-sources.json says new contracts are due in 14 days.
proposals.proposed_change: Flag the note as stale and ask a human to update the payment term after checking the current billing source.
proposals.source_preservation_rule: Do not rewrite the note automatically; preserve the original wording and source path in the proposal.
proposals.reason: Stale status requires a contradiction with the current source, which is present here.

proposals.observed_fact: The source_path property is empty and the body names no source file or URL.
proposals.proposed_change: Ask the human owner to attach a real source or mark the claim as unsupported; do not invent a URL.
proposals.source_preservation_rule: Do not fabricate provenance and do not edit the note without approval.
proposals.reason: Missing provenance can be detected, but the correct source is an editorial decision.

proposals.observed_fact: The frozen link graph gives notes/lonely-idea.md zero incoming links and zero outgoing links.
proposals.proposed_change: Queue the note for human review: link it to a project, keep it as a seed, or archive it after approval.
proposals.source_preservation_rule: Do not move or delete the orphan candidate during proposal generation.
proposals.reason: Orphan review is supported only because the frozen graph shows zero in-degree and zero out-degree.

proposals.observed_fact: The public pricing source says per-seat monthly pricing while the sales memo says annual-only contracted pricing.
proposals.proposed_change: Create a conflict review card that preserves both source paths and asks a human to scope which audience each statement applies to.
proposals.source_preservation_rule: Preserve both competing source paths; do not collapse one into the other.
proposals.reason: The proposal should expose the conflict rather than choose a winner.

proposals.observed_fact: The note has a source path, current status, and graph links; no contradiction or missing provenance is present.
proposals.reason: A maintenance assistant must demonstrate restraint when observable signals do not justify an action.
